parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Firebase Cloud Messaging destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise fcm:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native FCM HTTP v1 payload delivered straight to fcm.googleapis.com.
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment FCM destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Firebase Cloud Messaging (no Apprise)

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Firebase Cloud Messaging apikey

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Firebase Cloud Messaging targets
